spotlights.name: John Hibler
spotlights.title: Plant Manager
spotlights.quote: Joining the ABT has been a very rewarding experience because I have been able to watch Delta Chi getting re-established on the Purdue Campus. From the first day I met the first class of brothers, I felt a strong sense of brotherhood. This is a very close group and they have shown teamwork, leadership, and a dedicated commitment to the fraternity. They have overcome some difficult obstacles that would caused many others to give up. I am excited to see what this next generation of Delta Chi’s will be able to do on campus. Getting involved with ABT has given me more opportunities to contact old Delta Chi friends as well as share my experiences with the current brothers. I’m proud to be part of an organization that values integrity, service, and unity.
